examples: Clear out those rocks. The surface must be even.
Despite her fear, she spoke in an even voice.

definitions.text: Equal in proportion, quantity, size, etc.
examples: The distribution of food must be even.
We need to even this playing field; the west goal is too low.

definitions.text: To equal or equate; to make the same.

examples: I fulfilled my instructions even as I had promised.
You are leaving tonight? — Even so.

definitions.text: In reality (used to imply an extreme example in the case mentioned).
examples: Even a blind squirrel finds an acorn sometimes.
Did you even make it through the front door?
I was strong before, but now I am even stronger.
So let's see. There are two evens here and three odds.
We'll meet at even, when the sun is set.
